languages.text: "Уничтожьте как можно больше мелких тварей. Не дайте им взять нас числом!"
"Destroy as many of the petty creatures as you can. They must not be allowed to overwhelm us with their numbers!"
languages.original_text: "Уничтожьте как можно больше мелких тварей. Не дайте им взять нас числом!"

traits.locale_text: "Destroy as many of the petty creatures as you can. They must not be allowed to overwhelm us with their numbers!"
"Destroy as many of the petty creatures as you can. They must not be allowed to overwhelm us with their numbers!"
"Destroy as many of the petty creatures as you can. They must not be allowed to overwhelm us with their numbers!"

languages.text: 「小うるさい生き物をできるだけ多く殺せ。彼らの数で我々を圧倒させちゃいけない！」
languages.original_text: "Destroy as many of the petty creatures as you can. They must not be allowed to overwhelm us with their numbers!"

traits.locale_text: 「小うるさい生き物をできるだけ多く殺せ。彼らの数で我々を圧倒させちゃいけない！」

languages.text: «Destruyan tantas de esas criaturas como puedan. ¡No permitiremos que nos abrumen con superioridad numérica!».
languages.original_text: "Destroy as many of the petty creatures as you can. They must not be allowed to overwhelm us with their numbers!"

traits.locale_text: «Destruyan tantas de esas criaturas como puedan. ¡No permitiremos que nos abrumen con superioridad numérica!».

languages.text: “全力歼灭那些蝼蚁，绝不能让它们用数量压倒我们！”
languages.original_text: "Destroy as many of the petty creatures as you can. They must not be allowed to overwhelm us with their numbers!"

traits.locale_text: “全力歼灭那些蝼蚁，绝不能让它们用数量压倒我们！”

languages.text: "Zerstört möglichst viele dieser widerlichen Kreaturen. Sie dürfen uns mit ihrer zahlenmäßigen Überlegenheit nicht überwältigen!"
languages.original_text: "Destroy as many of the petty creatures as you can. They must not be allowed to overwhelm us with their numbers!"

traits.locale_text: "Zerstört möglichst viele dieser widerlichen Kreaturen. Sie dürfen uns mit ihrer zahlenmäßigen Überlegenheit nicht überwältigen!"

languages.text: "O önemsiz yaratıkları olabildiğince yok edelim. Sayılarıyla bizi ezmelerine izin verilmemeli!"
languages.original_text: "Destroy as many of the petty creatures as you can. They must not be allowed to overwhelm us with their numbers!"

traits.locale_text: "O önemsiz yaratıkları olabildiğince yok edelim. Sayılarıyla bizi ezmelerine izin verilmemeli!"

languages.text: « Détruisez autant de monstres que vous le pourrez. Nous ne leur permettrons pas de nous submerger ! »
languages.original_text: "Destroy as many of the petty creatures as you can. They must not be allowed to overwhelm us with their numbers!"

traits.locale_text: « Détruisez autant de monstres que vous le pourrez. Nous ne leur permettrons pas de nous submerger ! »
